## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Scope
- [ ] Focused change only (no unrelated refactors)
- [ ] Public behavior unchanged unless explicitly intended

## Test coverage
### Added/updated tests
- [ ] Component/unit
- [ ] Integration
- [ ] E2E (if user-visible flow changed)

### Tests run
- [ ] Focused test file(s)
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` (if applicable)

Paste command outputs or short pass/fail summary:

## UI impact
- [ ] No visible UI changes
- [ ] UI changed and screenshots/GIF attached

## Risk and rollback
- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Main risk areas:
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist
- [ ] Aligns with `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- [ ] Keeps Sudoku/domain invariants intact
- [ ] Updates docs/specs if behavior changed materially
